description:
Steal my best AI secret codes & automations free 👉 https://sabrina.dev
33M+ views last month with Blotato 👉 https://blotato.com

Most people fail at making money with AI in 2026 because they pick the wrong path or stay stuck in build mode. I run a profitable AI business with thousands of paying users and hit 30 million views last month teaching AI. These are the 5 paths I'd take if I had to start from zero today — no audience, no technical background, no warm network.

Here's what you'll learn:

→ Method 1: Personal Brand + AI Sponsorships — why AI startups are flush with cash and how to get them sponsoring your content even with a small following, plus the platform priority that actually grows a creator account in 2026 (TikTok-first, then Instagram and YouTube Shorts).

→ Method 2: Faceless Videos + AI Avatars — three profitable niches across TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube: AI-generated TikTok Shop product videos, the AI avatar monk playbook (2M+ Instagram followers in months), and selling AI avatar services with ElevenLabs voice cloning to busy business owners.

→ Method 3: Claude Training for Businesses — why everyone is migrating from ChatGPT to Claude, how to package one-day Claude Code and Claude Cowork training for $5K to $10K, and the exact DM playbook to land your first 5 customers on Instagram and LinkedIn.

→ Method 4: Vibe Coding (One Feature Only) — the two mistakes that kill almost every vibe-coded app, the 90-second one-feature rule, and the marketing flip every solo AI founder needs after launch.

→ Method 5: AI Marketing Automations (Live) — three plays I'd build right now instead of a generic AI automation agency: GoHighLevel setup-as-a-service, ManyChat AI for Instagram + Facebook, and LinkedIn automation with Expandi, PhantomBuster, and LeadShark.

Five real, validated AI side hustles for 2026. None require a technical background or an existing audience.

Hit like, subscribe, and ring the bell so you don't miss the next training.

⏱️ Chapters
00:00 - Why These 5 AI Money Methods Still Work in 2026
00:43 - The One-Person AI Empire Method (Tease)
01:00 - Method 1: Personal Brand + Sponsorships
01:24 - 99% of AI Content Is Just RTFM
02:45 - How AI Sponsorships Actually Work
03:48 - Why I Don't Take Sponsorships
04:25 - Best Platform Order: TikTok First, Then Cross-Post
05:40 - Method 2: 3 Faceless Video Ideas That Make Money
06:03 - Idea 1: AI Videos for TikTok Shop
06:51 - Idea 2: The AI Avatar Monk Playbook (2M+ Followers)
08:01 - Idea 3: Selling AI Avatar Services to Business Owners
09:26 - Method 3: Claude Training for Businesses
09:47 - Why Claude Is Blowing Up in 2026
11:11 - How to Land Your First 5 Claude-Training Clients
12:43 - Method 4: Vibe Coding (One Feature Only)
13:05 - Mistake 1: Overbuilding Your First Version
15:16 - Mistake 2: Skipping Marketing After Launch
16:54 - The Free Resource I Use for Viral Marketing Ideas
17:42 - DIY Content vs Paying Micro-Influencers
19:53 - Find Your Repeatable Viral Format
21:40 - Method 5: AI Marketing Automations (Live)
22:03 - Play 1: GoHighLevel Setup-as-a-Service
23:32 - Play 2: ManyChat AI for Instagram + Facebook
24:59 - Play 3: LinkedIn Automation (Carefully)
26:09 - Final Recap: Pick One Path and Stick With It

Alternative Titles for the algo:
- 5 AI Side Hustles I'd Start in 2026 (From Zero)
- How to Make Money with AI in 2026 (5 Methods That Actually Work)
- 5 Ways to Make Money with AI With Zero Audience or Tech Skills
- If I Started Over in 2026, Here's How I'd Make Money with AI
- 5 Real AI Businesses You Can Start in 2026 (No BS)

#ai #claude #chatgpt
--
I'm Sabrina Ramonov. I'm on a mission to teach 1 million people AI. I'm also the solo founder of Blotato.com. It's a SaaS app for creators/entrepreneurs to go viral faster with AI, just like me (0 to 500k+ in 6 months solo).

Today: Started https://Blotato.com to distribute 100+ pieces of content per week. 1000s of creators & entrepreneurs use Blotato to go viral faster with AI.

Get FREE AI prompts, playbooks, and agents 👉 https://sabrina.dev/p/free
